debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  intro w args e h₁
  intro h₂
  have h₃ : assert_bits args = true := h₂.1
  have h₄ : e = bits2num args := h₂.2
  have h₅ : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have h₅₁ : e.eval.val = (bits2num args).val := by
      rw [h₄]
      <;> simp [Exp.eval]
    rw [h₅₁]
    -- Prove that the value of (bit2num args) is less than 2^w
    have h₅₂ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
      have h₅₃ : assert_bits args = true := h₃
      have h₅₄ : ∀ (x : ZMod p), x ∈ args.toFinset → (x : ℕ) < 2 := by
        intro x hx
        have h₅₅ : assert_bits args = true := h₃
        have h₅₆ : ∀ (i : Fin w), args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ = 0 ∨ args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ = 1 := by
          simp only [assert_bits, Vector.all_eq_true, Fin.forall_fin_succ] at h₅₅
          simp_all [Vector.get, Fin.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        have h₅₇ : x ∈ args.toFinset := hx
        have h₅₈ : ∃ (i : Fin w), args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ = x := by
          simp_all [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_toFinset]
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try {
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try {
            use ⟨args.indexOf x, _⟩ <;> simp_all [Vector.indexOf_get]
            <;> omega
          })
        rcases h₅₈ with ⟨i, h₅₈⟩
        have h₅₉ : args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ = 0 ∨ args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ = 1 := h₅₆ i
        have h₆₀ : (x : ℕ) < 2 := by
          simp_all [ZMod.val_nat_cast]
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try {
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₆₁ := Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p)
            have h₆₂ : p > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos h₆₁
            have h₆₃ : (x : ℕ) < p := by
              simp_all [ZMod.val_nat_cast]
              <;> omega
            omega
          })
        exact h₆₀
      have h₅₉ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
        -- Use the fact that each bit is 0 or 1 to bound the value
        have h₅₁₀ : ∀ (i : Fin w), (args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ : ℕ) < 2 := by
          intro i
          have h₅₁₁ : (args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ : ℕ) < 2 := by
            have h₅₁₂ : (args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ : ℕ) < 2 := by
              have h₅₁₃ := h₅₄ (args.get ⟨i, by omega⟩) (by
                simp_all [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_toFinset]
                <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try {
                  use i
                  <;> simp_all [Vector.get]
                }))
              exact h₅₁₃
            exact h₅₁₂
          exact h₅₁₁
        -- Calculate the maximum possible value of bits2num args
        have h₅₁₁ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
          -- Use the fact that the number is a sum of powers of 2 with coefficients 0 or 1
          have h₅₁₂ : (bits2num args : ℕ) = (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 args : ℕ) := by
            simp [bits2num]
            <;>
            rfl
          rw [h₅₁₂]
          have h₅₁₃ : (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
            -- Use induction to prove the bound
            have h₅₁₄ : ∀ (n : ℕ) (v : Vector (ZMod p) n), (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 v : ℕ) < 2 ^ n := by
              intro n
              induction' n with n ih
              · simp
              · intro v
                rw [Vector.foldl]
                have h₅₁₅ : (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩ : ℕ) < 2 := by
                  have h₅₁₆ := h₅₄ (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩) (by
                    simp_all [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_toFinset]
                    <;>
                    (try omega) <;>
                    (try {
                      use ⟨n, by omega⟩
                      <;> simp_all [Vector.get]
                    }))
                  exact h₅₁₆
                have h₅₁₇ : (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 (v.tail) : ℕ) < 2 ^ n := by
                  apply ih
                have h₅₁₈ : (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩ : ℕ) + 2 * (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 (v.tail) : ℕ) < 2 ^ (n + 1) := by
                  have h₅₁₉ : (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩ : ℕ) < 2 := h₅₁₅
                  have h₅₂₀ : (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 (v.tail) : ℕ) < 2 ^ n := h₅₁₇
                  have h₅₂₁ : (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩ : ℕ) + 2 * (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 (v.tail) : ℕ) < 2 + 2 * (2 ^ n) := by
                    nlinarith
                  have h₅₂₂ : 2 + 2 * (2 ^ n) = 2 ^ (n + 1) + 1 := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;>
                    simp [pow_succ]
                    <;>
                    omega
                  have h₅₂₃ : 2 + 2 * (2 ^ n) ≤ 2 ^ (n + 1) + 1 := by
                    omega
                  have h₅₂₄ : (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩ : ℕ) + 2 * (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 (v.tail) : ℕ) < 2 ^ (n + 1) + 1 := by
                    omega
                  have h₅₂₅ : (v.get ⟨n, by omega⟩ : ℕ) + 2 * (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => (b : ℕ) + 2 * acc) 0 (v.tail) : ℕ) < 2 ^ (n + 1) := by
                    omega
                  exact h₅₂₅
                simp_all [pow_succ]
                <;>
                omega
            have h₅₁₄' := h₅₁₄ w args
            exact h₅₁₄'
          exact h₅₁₃
        exact h₅₁₁
      exact h₅₉
    -- Now we have the value less than 2^w, but we need to consider the modulo p
    have h₅₃ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := h₅₂
    have h₅₄ : p ≥ 2 := by
      have h₅₄₁ := Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p)
      have h₅₄₂ : p ≥ 2 := Nat.Prime.two_le h₅₄₁
      exact h₅₄₂
    have h₅₅ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < p := by
      have h₅₅₁ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := h₅₃
      have h₅₅₂ : 2 ^ w ≤ p := by
        have h₅₅₃ : p ≥ 2 := h₅₄
        have h₅₅₄ : w < p := by
          -- Prove that w < p
          have h₅₅₅ : w < p := by
            by_contra h₅₅₆
            have h₅₅₇ : w ≥ p := by omega
            have h₅₅₈ : 2 ^ w ≥ 2 ^ p := by
              apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right
              · norm_num
              · omega
            have h₅₅₉ : 2 ^ p > p := by
              have h₅₅₁₀ := Nat.Prime.two_le (Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p))
              have h₅₅₁₁ : 2 ^ p > p := by
                have h₅₅₁₂ : p ≥ 2 := h₅₅₁₀
                have h₅₅₁₃ : 2 ^ p > p := by
                  calc
                    2 ^ p ≥ 2 ^ p := by rfl
                    _ > p := by
                      have h₅₅₁₄ : p < 2 ^ p := by
                        exact Nat.lt_pow_self (by omega) p
                      omega
                exact h₅₅₁₃
              exact h₅₅₁₁
            omega
          exact h₅₅₅
        have h₅₅₅ : 2 ^ w ≤ p := by
          have h₅₅₆ : w < p := h₅₅₄
          have h₅₅₇ : 2 ^ w ≤ p := by
            -- Use the fact that 2^w grows exponentially and p is a prime
            have h₅₅₈ : w < p := h₅₅₆
            have h₅₅₉ : 2 ^ w ≤ p := by
              by_contra h₅₅₁₀
              have h₅₅₁₁ : 2 ^ w > p := by omega
              have h₅₅₁₂ : 2 ^ w > p := h₅₅₁₁
              have h₅₅₁₃ : p < 2 ^ w := by omega
              have h₅₅₁₄ : p < 2 ^ w := h₅₅₁₃
              have h₅₅₁₅ : w < p := h₅₅₈
              have h₅₅₁₆ : w < 2 ^ w := by
                calc
                  w < p := h₅₅₁₅
                  _ ≤ 2 ^ w := by
                    have h₅₅₁₇ : p ≤ 2 ^ w := by
                      by_contra h₅₅₁₈
                      have h₅₅₁₉ : p > 2 ^ w := by omega
                      have h₅₅₂₀ : p > 2 ^ w := h₅₅₁₉
                      have h₅₅₂₁ : p < 2 ^ w := h₅₅₁₄
                      omega
                    omega
                  _ = 2 ^ w := by rfl
              have h₅₅₁₇ : w < 2 ^ w := h₅₅₁₆
              have h₅₅₁₈ : 2 ^ w ≤ p := by
                omega
              omega
            exact h₅₅₉
          exact h₅₅₇
        exact h₅₅₅
      have h₅₅₃ : (bits2num args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := h₅₃
      have h₅₅₄ : 2 ^ w ≤ p := h₅₅₂
      omega
    have h₅₆
